zh.lifeSummary: 當John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk於1422年出生在英國諾福爾可霍沙安 聖 菲絲時，他的父親Sir Robert Howard37歲，母親Margaret Mowbray23歲。他於1441年8月與Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1462年登記服兵役。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年63歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk于1422年出生在英国諾福爾可霍沙安 聖 菲絲时，他的父亲Sir Robert Howard37岁，母亲Margaret Mowbray23岁。他于1441年8月与Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1462年登记服兵役。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年63岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk was born in 1422, in Horsham Saint Faith, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Howard, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Mowbray, was 23. He married Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk in August 1441, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1462. He died on 22 August 1485, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk est né en 1422, à Horsham Saint Faith, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Howard, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mowbray, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk en août 1441, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1462. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk 1422 in Horsham Saint Faith, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Howard 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Mowbray 23. Er hat im August 1441 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1462 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk è nato il nel 1422 nel Horsham Saint Faith, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Howard, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mowbray, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk nel agosto 1441, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1462. Morì il 22 agosto 1485, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolkが1422年にイギリスノーフォルクホールシャム サイント ファイスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Howardは37歳，母Margaret Mowbrayは23歳であった。1441年8月にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでCatherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年に兵役登録をした。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで63歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードスエトフォード プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk(이)가 1422년 영국 노르폴크 호르샤 세인트 파이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Howard(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mowbray(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1441년 8월 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드 테트퍼드 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk nasceu em 1422, em Horsham Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Howard, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mowbray, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk em agosto de 1441, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1462. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk родился в 1422 г. в местности хауршам сеинт феит, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Howard было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mowbray, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk август 1441 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1462 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности тетфорд приори, тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

es.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk nació en 1422, en Horsham Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Howard, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Mowbray, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk en agosto de 1441, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1462. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1485, en Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
